footer.trademarkNotice: Citadel Colour, Vallejo, AK Interactive, and Coat d'Arms are trademarks of their respective owners. coat-codex is an independent fan project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any of them.

postGuide.heading: How to post a recipe
postGuide.intro: Recipes are created, edited, and published from the coat-codex app. Coat Scriptorium is the public library where published recipes appear.
postGuide.step1: Create or open a recipe in the coat-codex app.
postGuide.step2: Choose “Publish to Scriptorium”, then pick a cover image, a display handle, and a deletion password.
postGuide.step3: Your recipe appears in the public feed here within a few minutes.
postGuide.publishedBody: Only the recipe structure (colors, tools, steps, techniques and mix ratios), your step memos, tool notes, and a single cover image are published. Your swatch photos, step photos and timestamps stay on your device.
postGuide.notBackupBody: Because of this, a published recipe is not a full backup — keep your own export if you need one.
postGuide.deleteBody: Keep the deletion password you set when publishing. You can remove your recipe at any time from its page; deletion takes effect within about five minutes.
postGuide.policyBody: Only upload photos you took yourself. See the Terms and Content Policy for details.

terms.heading: Terms & Disclaimer
terms.ownershipBody: Rights to any recipe you submit remain with you, the submitter. By posting to Coat Scriptorium, you grant coat-codex a non-exclusive license to display, store, and distribute your submission on this site.
terms.deletionBody: Each post is protected by a delete password you set at submission time. You can delete your own post at any time by entering that password on the recipe page. If you lose your delete password, contact us at {{email}} and we will assist with removal after reasonable verification.
terms.deletionTtlBody: Because published pages and images are served through a cache, deletion may take up to 5 minutes to be fully reflected across all viewers before the cached copies expire.
terms.disclaimerBody: Coat Scriptorium is provided "as is", without warranty of any kind. Use of this site and any recipes found on it is at your own risk; coat-codex accepts no responsibility for any loss or damages arising from its use.
terms.trademarkIntro: coat-codex is an independent, non-commercial hobby project built by a hobbyist for hobbyists. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or otherwise officially connected with any of the paint manufacturers or brands referenced within the app.
terms.trademarkListIntro: The following brand and product names referenced in coat-codex are trademarks or trade names of their respective owners:
terms.trademarkCitadel: Citadel Colour — a trademark of Games Workshop Limited
terms.trademarkVallejo: Vallejo — a trademark of Acrylicos Vallejo, S.L.
terms.trademarkAk: AK Interactive — a trademark of its manufacturer
terms.trademarkCoatDarms: Coat d'Arms — a trade name of its current manufacturer/distributor
terms.trademarkOwnership: All product names, brand names, and trademarks referenced here remain the property of their respective owners. They are used in coat-codex solely to help users identify, record, and reference paint colours for their own personal painting logs — not to imply any business relationship, sponsorship, or endorsement.
terms.trademarkColorNote: Colour values (hex/RGB) shown in coat-codex are digital approximations of physical paint colours, compiled from publicly available reference sources. Actual paint colour may vary due to screen calibration, lighting conditions, and manufacturing batch variation.
terms.trademarkContact: If you are a rights holder and have a concern about how your brand is referenced here, please contact: {{email}}

contentPolicy.heading: Content Policy
contentPolicy.photoHeading: Photos you post must be your own
contentPolicy.photoBody: Only post photos you took yourself of your own painted miniatures. Do not upload official artwork, box art, or photos taken by someone else. Posts found to use non-original photos will be removed.
contentPolicy.reportingBody: Every recipe page has a report button. If a post violates this policy, please use it to flag the post for review.
contentPolicy.reportingThresholdBody: Once a post receives reports from enough distinct visitors, it is automatically hidden from the public feed pending moderation review.
